title: Academic Advising Specialist (College of Forestry)
live_evidence: HTTP 200 on posting; posting open (Posted 06/08/2026, Closing 07/19/2026, Full Consideration date not yet passed). JD read in full via Patchright; requirements captured in _jd_raw.txt.
sponsorship_note: Cap-exempt public university. JD contains NO 'no sponsorship' / 'must be authorized without sponsorship' / ITAR / citizenship-required language. EEO employer, 'fair chance' employer — background check does not automatically disqualify. Sponsorship-safe for Jamie.
blocker: ACCOUNT CREATION IS CAPTCHA-GATED. OSU PageUp requires an applicant account to apply (apply flow -> /pre_apply -> redirects to /login). Jamie has NO existing OSU account. The ONLY account-creation link on the login page is 'Or Create an Account' -> /user/new, and /user/new is gated behind an Imperva/Incapsula hCaptcha 'I am human' anti-bot challenge (page body = single <iframe id=main-iframe src=/_Incapsula_Resource?...incident_id=...>; visible hCaptcha 'I am human' checkbox + 'jobs.oregonstate.edu - Additional security check is required'). Confirmed on BOTH the shared sibling Chrome (port 9333) AND a clean, dedicated, freshly-launched Chrome (port 9334). Per doctrine + explicit instruction, CAPTCHA is a hard automation boundary — NOT solved, NOT bypassed.
why_not_submitted: Tailored-resume-or-STOP was satisfied (package built + verified). The wall is purely the human-only hCaptcha on account creation — there is no non-CAPTCHA route to an account, and no account = no access to the application form. Emailing the listed contact (Nicole Kent) is NOT an accepted substitute: the posting explicitly requires applying through the portal with attached documents + references. Staged for human to pass the one-time hCaptcha, then finish (or hand back for auto-fill).
persistence_attempts: Direct GET /user/new -> Imperva interstitial (empty body, _Incapsula_Resource iframe).
In-page click of the exact 'Or Create an Account' (/user/new) anchor from /login -> Imperva hCaptcha interstitial.
Repeated on a clean isolated dedicated Chrome (own port 9334, own profile) -> same hCaptcha. Not an automation-fingerprint fluke on the shared browser; it's a real gate on the endpoint.

Audited full /login HTML (14.6KB): the ONLY registration path is /user/new (no inline 'new user' form, no alternative non-CAPTCHA route). Login form requires an existing username/password Jamie does not have.
resume_source_file: resume.pdf (identical content; canonical-named copy also present)
render_report: resume=1p cover=1p (render_one.py [OK]); autoFit OK; no bullet wraps; even margins; visually verified via _verify_resume.png + _verify_cover.png.
fit: P1c — honest stretch into higher-ed advising. JD 'What You Will Need' lists higher-ed student-services experience OR related advising/counseling/mentoring (K-12/non-profits OK), Bachelor's, MS Office, equity commitment, communication. Jamie's TRUE bridge: BA Psychology & Education Studies (Wesleyan) incl. Practicum in Education Studies + Educational Psychology coursework; MS Applied Org Psych; InGenius educational programs (600+ participants, needs assessments, guides/sample plans, records across 20+ programs); cross-cultural rapport; data/records fluency. She does NOT have formal academic-advising-office experience or DegreeWorks/Banner — cover is explicitly candid about this and frames the transferable foundation. No fabrication: no claim of 1:1 academic advising she lacks.
resume_tailoring: Student-success/advising recipe. Summary 3-pillar broad ('student success & program' role-noun, 'guiding people toward their goals'). InGenius first (title 'Program Enablement Manager'), bullets re-angled to advising/support/needs-assessment/records — full richness, all metrics kept (600+, 25+, 70+, -75%, 20+). NextGen/Vestas/Kronos = 4 bullets each; ODN = 2 bullets, COLLECTIVE (diagnostic discovery + executive insight), labeled 'Organization Development Network (ODN) Oregon'. EDUCATION ORDER FLIPPED to lead with Wesleyan (BA Psych & Education Studies — directly relevant); Wesleyan Relevant Coursework kept. Header 'Portland, OR (Open to Relocation)'. No banned content ($340K/17 launches/Transition Projects absent).
